name: postgres-patterns
description: Evaluations for postgres-patterns skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-postgres-tasks
evals.description: Skill should trigger on PostgreSQL query, schema, and performance tasks

prompts.input: Write an optimized SQL query to paginate through a large orders table
prompts.reason: SQL query optimization including pagination patterns

prompts.input: Design the schema for a multi-tenant application using Row Level Security
prompts.reason: Schema design with RLS is explicitly covered by the skill

prompts.input: This Postgres query is slow, help me add the right index
prompts.reason: Troubleshooting slow queries and indexing matches skill activation criteria

prompts.input: Set up connection pooling for our PostgreSQL database
prompts.reason: Connection pooling setup is listed as a skill activation scenario

prompts.input: What index type should I use for a JSONB column with contains queries?
prompts.reason: Index selection for JSONB is in the skill's quick reference

evals.name: trigger-negative-non-postgres
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for non-PostgreSQL or unrelated database tasks

prompts.input: Write a MongoDB aggregation pipeline for grouping orders by status
Create a Prisma migration to add a new table
prompts.reason: Migration task covered by database-migrations skill, not postgres-patterns

prompts.input: How do I connect to a MySQL database from Node.js?
prompts.reason: MySQL connection question, not PostgreSQL patterns
